notes: Each option's 'id' is the eLogbook data-nodeid used to select the procedure in the form (the value for WebView injection). 'name' is the display label / extraction target. A procedure may appear under several categories; the flat 'procedures' list is the authoritative deduplicated picklist, 'tree' preserves the on-site accordion structure for the picker UI and for giving the AI category context. | Spoken-form aliases added 2026-06-30, resolver-validated.
